context_only: # 0.23.0 — Audit Redesign, Enforcement, Round Memory, and Domain Lenses
### 2.4 Prompt-level field naming (avoid confusion with finding category)
### 3.4 No spec excerpt for non-spec roles
### 4.4 No full parser bundled in v0.23.0
### 5.2 Task-to-file mapping and per-role selection rules

tasks.title: Add Task gate_skipped_reason field
tasks.acceptance:
- Task.GateSkippedReason string field with omitempty json tag exists
- tp reopen clears gate_skipped_reason
- tp set rejects gate_skipped_reason as managed field
tasks.closed_reason:
- Task.GateSkippedReason string field with omitempty json tag exists at internal/model/task.go:34, round-trip tested
- tp reopen clears gate_skipped_reason at internal/cli/reopen.go:59
- tp set rejects gate_skipped_reason as managed field at internal/cli/set.go:25, test TestSetRejectsGateSkippedReason green

tasks.title: Add Workflow gate timeout checks cap fields
tasks.acceptance:
- Workflow gains GateTimeoutSeconds default 600, Checks default empty, ReviewMaxRounds and AuditMaxRounds default 0 via UnmarshalJSON
- every row of the 6.7 field table serializes with stated defaults
tasks.closed_reason:
- Workflow gains GateTimeoutSeconds default 600, Checks default [], ReviewMaxRounds/AuditMaxRounds default 0 via UnmarshalJSON at internal/model/workflow.go:41; explicit zero preserved
- 6.7 field table serialization: TestWorkflow_FieldTableSerialization asserts gate_timeout_seconds:600, checks:[], review_max_rounds:0, audit_max_rounds:0 round-trip; go test ./... + golangci-lint run green

tasks.title: Enforce workflow field write and read rules
tasks.acceptance:
- tp set --workflow rejects out-of-range gate_timeout_seconds and max_rounds with exit 1
- hand-edited out-of-range values fall back to 600 and 0 at read time with tp validate warnings
- quality_gate stays read-only via tp set
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp set --workflow: gate_timeout_seconds 30-3600, review/audit_max_rounds 0-50 araligi disinda output.Error + exit 1 (internal/cli/set.go workflowFieldRange)
- El ile bozulmus degerler icin Workflow.Effective* helper'lari 600/0'a düşüyor (internal/model/workflow.go); tp validate ayni durumlar icin warning üretiyor (validateConvergence)
- quality_gate readOnlyWorkflowFields icinde kaliyor, tp set --workflow reddediyor

tasks.title: Implement shared RunCommand runner
tasks.acceptance:
- RunCommand runs sh -c on Unix and cmd /C on Windows with inherited env and caller cwd
- 64 KB ring buffer captures combined output with parameterized tail size
- timeout counts as failure with timed-out message
tasks.closed_reason:
- RunCommand at internal/engine/runcmd.go:64 uses sh -c on Unix, cmd /C on Windows (runtime.GOOS), cmd.Env inherited (nil), cmd.Dir = caller-provided dir
- tailBuffer bounds combined stdout+stderr to 64 KB (runBufferSize), tail(n) parameterizes reported line count
- context.WithTimeout + DeadlineExceeded branch returns Passed=false, ExitCode=nil, Message 'timed out after <N>s'

tasks.title: Test RunCommand success failure timeout
tasks.acceptance: - TestRunCommand_Success_Failure_Timeout passes per the 19.1 description
tasks.closed_reason: - TestRunCommand_Success_Failure_Timeout internal/engine/runcmd_test.go'da: exit 0 -> Passed, exit 3 -> failure + output tail, sleep 5 + 1s timeout -> TimedOut + 'timed out after 1s' mesaji; tail parametresi ve cwd/env kalitimi da alt testlerde; go test ./... yesil

tasks.title: Rewrite VerifyClosure with evidence-line rule
tasks.acceptance:
- ExtractKeywords stopWords technicalTermRegex and length check deleted per 7.1
- N>=2 criteria require N column-0 evidence lines; indented bullets do not count; N<=1 passes on non-empty reason
- forbidden patterns retained and covered-by skips verification; error hint enumerates criteria per 7.4
tasks.closed_reason:
- ExtractKeywords, stopWords, technicalTermRegex, filePathRegex ve min-length check silindi; gatePassed parametresi VerifyClosure imzasindan kaldirildi (internal/engine/closure.go)
- N>=2 kriter icin N adet kolon-0 '- ' evidence satiri zorunlu (CountEvidenceLines); girintili bullet sayilmiyor; N<=1 bos olmayan reason ile geciyor
- Forbidden pattern'lar korundu, coveredBy dogrulamayi atliyor; ClosureError.Hint kriterleri numarali sayiyor, cli done/close cagri noktalari ClosureHint kullaniyor

tasks.title: Test closure verification v2
tasks.acceptance: - TestVerifyClosure_EvidenceLines TestVerifyClosure_ForbiddenPatternsRetained TestVerifyClosure_KeywordMachineryGone pass per 19.1
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestVerifyClosure_EvidenceLines internal/engine/closure_test.go'da: 3 kriter + 3 kolon-0 satir geciyor, 3+2 sayilari isimleyerek düşüyor, girintili satirlar sayilmiyor, 1 kriter + serbest metin geciyor
- TestVerifyClosure_ForbiddenPatternsRetained: erteleme kalibi, tek kelime ve yol icermeyen mevcut-kapsam iddiasi reddediliyor
- TestVerifyClosure_KeywordMachineryGone: Turkce prose kriterler eslesen evidence-satiri sayisiyla geciyor

tasks.title: Wire gate into done and close
tasks.acceptance:
- every row of the 6.1 trigger table implemented; gate runs once per invocation after cheap checks
- gate runs pre-flock then flock re-read re-validates state atomically for single and multi per 6.2 item 6
- gate_passed_at stamped on success per 6.3
tasks.closed_reason:
- 6.1 tablosu: done single/multi/batch/auto-commit ve close gate'i invocation basina bir kez kosuyor (internal/cli/gate.go runQualityGatePreFlock, batchHasSurvivor); tp commit gate kosmyor; --covered-by gate'i atlamiyor; ucuz kontroller (checkDoneTarget) gate'ten once
- Gate flock'tan ONCE kosuyor; sonra flock icinde re-read + re-validate mevcut govdelerle korunuyor (done.go/close.go pre-flock bloklari); basarisizlikta exit 4, hicbir gorev kapanmiyor (TestGate_FailureClosesNothingWithExit4)
- Basarida kapanan her gorev gate_passed_at damgasi aliyor (gateRan || doneGatePassed); 6 yeni TestGate_* testi + tum suite + lint yesil

tasks.title: Gate failure error output
tasks.acceptance:
- exit 4 JSON error carries gate_cmd exit_code output_tail and hint per 6.4
- timeout reports gate timed out after Ns with null exit_code
tasks.closed_reason:
- Exit 4 JSON hatasi gate_cmd, exit_code, output_tail ve hint tasiyor (gate.go runQualityGatePreFlock/emitBatchGateFailure; TestGate_FailureClosesNothingWithExit4 alanlari dogruluyor)
- Timeout 'gate timed out after Ns' mesaji + null exit_code: gateFailureMessage ve TestGateFailureMessage_TimeoutReportsSecondsAndNullExitCode (internal/cli/gate_unit_test.go)

tasks.title: Implement --skip-gate escape hatch
tasks.acceptance:
- all 8 items of the 6.5 list implemented including empty-reason exit 2, no gate execution, recorded reason, show and report display
- --skip-gate with --gate-passed is exit 2
tasks.closed_reason:
- 6.5'in 8 maddesi: bos reason exit 2 (done+close), gate kosulmuyor (TestSkipGate_RecordsReasonAndSkipsExecution), gate_skipped_reason kaydediliyor + gate_passed_at null, gate'siz projede de kayit (TestSkipGate_RecordedEvenWithoutGate), show otomatik (omitempty) + report'a gate_skipped_reason alani eklendi, reopen temizligi ve tp set reddi onceki gorevden mevcut (reopen.go:59, gate_skip_field_test.go)
- Batch: entry bazli skip_gate (pointer alan), bos/whitespace deger entry'yi failures'a dusuruyor ve skip sayilmiyor (TestSkipGate_BatchEmptySkipGateFailsEntry), hepsi skip ise gate hic kosmuyor (TestSkipGate_BatchAllSkipNeverRunsGate), gate dusse bile skip entry'ler kapaniyor (TestSkipGate_BatchEntriesCloseDespiteGateFailure)
- --skip-gate + --gate-passed exit 2, --skip-gate + --batch exit 2 (TestSkipGate_UsageErrors); tum suite + lint yesil

tasks.title: Gate batch semantics
tasks.acceptance:
- cheap-check failures land in failures pre-gate; gate runs iff a surviving non-skip entry exists; skip entries close regardless of gate result per 6.1 and 6.4
- --skip-gate flag with --batch is exit 2; empty skip_gate entry fails into failures and does not count as skip
tasks.closed_reason:
- Ucuz-kontrol hatalari failures'a dusuyor ve gate'i tetiklemiyor (batchNeedsGate; TestGateBatch_CheapCheckFailuresDoNotTriggerGate); gate yalniz skip'siz survivor varsa 1 kez kosuyor (TestGateBatch_MixedCheapFailureAndSurvivorRunsGateOnce); skip entry'ler gate sonucundan bagimsiz kapaniyor (TestSkipGate_BatchEntriesCloseDespiteGateFailure)
- --skip-gate + --batch exit 2 (TestSkipGate_UsageErrors); bos skip_gate entry failures'a dusuyor ve skip sayilmiyor (TestSkipGate_BatchEmptySkipGateFailsEntry, batchNeedsGate cheap-check dali)

tasks.title: Keep --gate-passed compatibility
tasks.acceptance:
- flag ignored with info when quality_gate set; attestation preserved when unset per 6.6
- flag no longer affects closure verification
tasks.closed_reason:
- quality_gate doluyken flag yok sayiliyor + 'quality gate is executed by tp; --gate-passed ignored' info (done single/multi pre-flock; TTY-only cunku output.Info JSON modda sessiz); damga gerçek gate kosusundan (TestGatePassedCompat_IgnoredWithInfoWhenGateSet)
- quality_gate bosken attestation korunuyor, gate_passed_at flag'le damgalaniyor (TestGatePassedCompat_AttestationPreservedWithoutGate); flag closure dogrulamayi artik etkilemiyor (VerifyClosure imzasindan gatePassed engine-closure-v2'de kaldirildi)

tasks.title: Test gate execution paths
tasks.acceptance: - TestDoneGate_RunsOncePerInvocation TestDoneGate_AllSkipBatchNoRun TestDoneGate_SkipGateRecorded TestDoneGate_GatePassedCompat pass per 19.2
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestDoneGate_RunsOncePerInvocation: 3'lu batch tek gate kosusu, non-batch hata hicbir gorevi kapatmiyor, batch hatada yalniz skip entry'ler kapaniyor (internal/cli/donegate_test.go)
- TestDoneGate_AllSkipBatchNoRun, TestDoneGate_SkipGateRecorded (set reddi + reopen temizligi dahil), TestDoneGate_GatePassedCompat (flag yok sayma + attestation + skip-gate kombinasyonu exit 2) hepsi geciyor; suite + lint yesil

tasks.title: Parse spec YAML frontmatter
tasks.acceptance:
- tp: mapping parsed via gopkg.in/yaml.v3 with domain and lens keys per 12.1
- unterminated block treated as content with lint error; malformed YAML stays excluded with defaults per 12.2 item 8
- non-string domain, non-mapping lens, unknown lens keys, non-list values, non-string elements produce lint warnings and are ignored
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp: mapping'i gopkg.in/yaml.v3 ile parse ediliyor; domain (default software) ve lens (implementer/tester/architect/all) anahtarlari okunuyor, diger top-level anahtarlar yok sayiliyor (internal/engine/frontmatter.go; go.mod'a ilk YAML bagimliligi eklendi)
- Kapanmayan blok icerik sayiliyor + lint error; kapali-ama-bozuk YAML bloklarda blok excluded kaliyor, defaults uygulaniyor + parse hatasi lint error (TestParseFrontmatter_StructuralFailures)
- Non-string domain, non-mapping lens/tp, bilinmeyen lens anahtari, non-list deger, non-string eleman: hepsi lint warning + ignore (TestParseFrontmatter_ShapeWarnings, _NonMappingLensAndTP)

tasks.title: Exclude frontmatter from all parsers
tasks.acceptance: - all 8 exclusion surfaces of the 12.2 list implemented with absolute line numbers preserved
tasks.closed_reason:
- BlankFrontmatter/BlankFrontmatterLines (engine/frontmatter_blank.go) blogu bos satirlarla degistirerek mutlak satir numaralarini koruyor; 8 yuzey bagli: countContentLines, ParseHeadings, cli lint parseSpecFile (lint kurallari + structured extraction ayni lines'i kullaniyor), DiffSections cagrilari (review.go + review_verify.go), readSpecContent (inline embed), audit.go specData, ExtractSpecExcerpt (plan/show/next spec_excerpt) fm satirlarini atliyor
- Yapisal bozulma davranisi parser'dan geliyor: kapanmayan blok Present=false oldugundan icerik sayiliyor, bozuk YAML'da blok excluded kaliyor; TestBlankFrontmatter_ParserExclusion 3 yuzeyi mutlak satir numarasiyla dogruluyor

tasks.title: Report frontmatter in lint output
tasks.acceptance: - tp lint --json emits frontmatter object with present lines domain lens_roles per 12.4 including the exact no-frontmatter shape
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp lint --json frontmatter nesnesi {present, lines ('1-K'), domain, lens_roles} emit ediyor; lens_roles bos-olmayan listeli anahtarlar implementer,tester,architect,all sirasiyla (lint.go lintFrontmatter; TestLintFrontmatter_ObjectShapes)
- Frontmatter'siz spec'te tam sekil {present:false, lines:null, domain:'software', lens_roles:[]}; bozuk YAML parse hatasini adlandiran lint error + defaults (ayni testin alt vakalari)

tasks.title: Test frontmatter parse and exclusion
tasks.acceptance: - TestFrontmatter_ParseAndExclusion TestFrontmatter_MalformedYAML TestFrontmatter_Unterminated pass per 19.1
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestFrontmatter_ParseAndExclusion: tp mapping parse + content lines, headings, structured elements, DiffSections ve spec_excerpt bloktan ariniyor; mutlak satir numaralari korunuyor (internal/engine/frontmatter_named_test.go)
- TestFrontmatter_MalformedYAML: kapali-bozuk blok excluded kaliyor, defaults + lint error; TestFrontmatter_Unterminated: acilip kapanmayan blok icerik + lint error, icindeki heading parse ediliyor

tasks.title: Implement audit category enum
tasks.acceptance:
- 5 constants with IsValidCategory; ResolveAuditCategory enforces the 2.2 precedence
- RenderAuditCategoryText renders enum plus precedence from shared constants per 4.4
- category presence rules of 2.3 documented in rendered schema text
tasks.closed_reason:
- 5 sabit (security, concurrency, error-handling, correctness, contract) + IsValidCategory; ResolveAuditCategory 2.2 onceligini auditCategoryPrecedence dilimiyle uyguluyor (internal/engine/audit_category.go)
- RenderAuditCategoryText enum + oncelik metnini AYNI sabit diliminden uretiyor (4.4 tek-kaynak sarti)
- 2.3 presence kurallari (her satirda category; PASS -> explicit null; PARTIAL/FAIL -> enum, null degil) render edilen metinde belgelendi

tasks.title: Implement audit file filtering
tasks.acceptance:
- task-to-file mapping via commit_sha with alphabetical list ordering per 5.2; drop rules filter universe first per 5.5
- per-role selection ranking caps and fallback implemented for all three roles; --affected-files replaces the universe
- affected_files exposed as path tasks diff_summary per 5.6
tasks.closed_reason:
- Task-to-file eslemesi commit_sha uzerinden (GitTaskFileMapping: git show --name-only, evrenle kesisim, sha'siz/bilinmeyen sha'li gorev sifir dosya), dosya-basina task idleri ve listeler alfabetik; drop kurallari evreni ONCE filtreliyor (binary, testdata/**, *.golden, silinmisler) — cap'ler sonraki uygun dosyalarla doluyor (internal/engine/auditfiles.go SelectAuditFiles/filterAuditUniverse)
- Uc rolun secimi: spec-coverage task-sayisi desc + alfabetik tie-break cap 20 ve bos-union'da ilk-20 fallback; security path VEYA HEAD ilk-200-satir substring sezgisi (HEAD'te olmayan dosya yalniz path'ten), alfabetik cap 20; maintainability ilk 10; --affected-files evreni degistirdiginde ayni kurallar uygulanir (girdi enjeksiyonlu tasarim), diff disi dosyalar +0/-0
- affected_files {path, tasks, diff_summary} olarak AuditFileEntry'de; isimli TestFilterFiles_* testleri engine-audit-tests gorevinde geliyor

tasks.title: Test audit categories and filtering
tasks.acceptance:
- TestAuditCategory_EnumValid TestAuditCategory_PrecedenceResolution TestRenderAuditCategoryText_ContainsEnumAndPrecedence pass
- TestFilterFiles_SpecCoverage_RanksByTaskCount Cap20 Security Maintainability DropsBinaryFixturesDeleted DropFirstBackfill pass per 19.1
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestAuditCategory_EnumValid, _PrecedenceResolution, TestRenderAuditCategoryText_ContainsEnumAndPrecedence: 5'li enum, oncelik cozumu ve render metninin enum+oncelik+presence icerigi (internal/engine/auditfiles_test.go)
- TestFilterFiles_SpecCoverage_RanksByTaskCount (task sayisi desc, alfabetik tie, +0/-0 fallback), _Cap20 (spec-coverage ve security), _Security (path + HEAD-icerik sezgisi, HEAD'te olmayan dosya yalniz path, alfabetik), _Maintainability (alfabetik ilk 10), _DropsBinaryFixturesDeleted (fallback listesi dahil), _DropFirstBackfill (13-3=10, kuyruk ham 11-13'ten doluyor) hepsi geciyor

tasks.title: Rework auditPrompt output schema
tasks.acceptance:
- auditPrompt drops Category and gains ChecklistItems and AffectedFiles fields; ChecklistItem Type enum includes finding per 3.2
- NDJSON output schema of section 4 embedded as prompt guidance including the class field row
tasks.closed_reason:
- auditPrompt'ta Category alani yok (testte anahtar yoklugu dogrulaniyor); ChecklistItems ([]ChecklistItem, 3.2 Type enum'u finding dahil yorumda belgeli) ve AffectedFiles ({path, tasks, diff_summary}) alanlari eklendi ve dolduruluyor (audit.go, audit_schema.go; TestAuditSchema_PromptFieldsAndOutputSchema)
- 4. bolum NDJSON semasi renderAuditOutputSchema ile her prompt'a gomuluyor: alan tablosu class satiri dahil, evidence_lines cift formu, kategori enum + oncelik metni RenderAuditCategoryText'ten (tek kaynak); eski 'PASS|PARTIAL|FAIL' cikti-format satirini asserte eden test yeni semaya guncellendi

tasks.title: Route checklist items to roles
tasks.acceptance:
- spec items and finding items route to spec-coverage; file-level checklists to security and maintainability per 1.2
- empty roles omitted and prompts emitted in fixed order per 5.3
tasks.closed_reason:
- 1.2 ayrik yonlendirme: table_row/list_item/task_acceptance ve finding item'lari spec-coverage'a; security ve maintainability dosya-bazli sentetik file_check item'lari (file-sec-<n>/file-maint-<n>, rol listesi sirasiyla) tasiyor, hicbir item iki prompt'ta gorunmuyor (routeChecklist, internal/cli/audit_roles.go; TestAuditRouting_DisjointAndFixedOrder)
- 5.3: bos rol prompts'tan atlaniyor (security eslesmesiz vaka testte), promptlar sabit spec-coverage -> security -> maintainability-conventions sirasinda; rol basina tek prompt (eski 50-item bolme kaldirildi, eski testler yeni davranisa uyarlandi)

tasks.title: Rewrite generateAuditPrompts
tasks.acceptance:
- body order and per-item JSON embedding per 3.1 and 3.2 with deterministic ids including file-sec-n file-maint-n finding-n and pinned checklist order
- expected_evidence per 3.3 never empty; CLAUDE.md excerpt rule and lookup per 3.4
- Output Schema block embeds category enum and precedence text
tasks.closed_reason:
- 3.1 govde sirasi (Role -> Role Rules -> Spec Excerpt yalniz spec-coverage -> Project Context yalniz maintainability -> JSON-array Checklist -> Affected Files (max 20) 5.4 formatiyla -> Output Schema) buildRolePrompt'ta; siralama index karsilastirmalariyla testte (TestAuditPrompts_BodyOrderAndEmbedding)
- 3.2 deterministik idler: table-t-r/list-l-n/task-<id> mevcut semalar, file-sec-<n>/file-maint-<n> rol listesi indeksiyle, finding-<n> dosya indeksiyle; pinned siralama (table+list spec_line artan, sonra task, sonra finding); ayni girdiyle yeniden uretim byte-esit (TestAuditPrompts_DeterministicRegeneration)
- 3.3 expected_evidence hicbir zaman bos degil (task->files eslemesi, section-arama fallback'i, inspect-file, verify-the-fix-120-char); 3.4 CLAUDE.md excerpt'u task-dosyasi dizini -> git koku sirasiyla bulunuyor, '## Conventions' span'i 50 satir cap'iyle, sonraki basligda kesiliyor (claudeMDExcerptFor; testte 'ignored' bolumu dislaniyor)

tasks.title: Test audit prompt generation
tasks.acceptance: - TestRouteChecklist_Disjoint TestGenerateAuditPrompts_ThreeRolesPresent EmptyRoleOmitted StructuredItems NoCategoryField SpecExcerptOnlyForSpecCoverage CLAUDEmdOnlyForMaintainability pass per 19.2
tasks.closed_reason: - Yedi isimli test 19.2 tarifleriyle geciyor: TestRouteChecklist_Disjoint ve TestGenerateAuditPrompts_EmptyRoleOmitted (rename + tarif yorumu, audit_routing_test.go), TestGenerateAuditPrompts_ThreeRolesPresent / _StructuredItems (JSON-array govde = ChecklistItems) / _NoCategoryField / _SpecExcerptOnlyForSpecCoverage / _CLAUDEmdOnlyForMaintainability (audit_named_test.go, paylasilan uc-rol kurulumuyla)

tasks.title: Implement review state engine
tasks.acceptance:
- state directory layout and initial state.json written by first creator per 8.1 and 8.2
- flock-guarded writes, round arithmetic, consecutive_clean, spec_hash staleness computed per 8.2 and 8.6
- corrupt or index-less directory aborts with exit 3; missing round file skipped with warning
tasks.closed_reason:
- 8.1 dizin yerlesimi (ReviewStateDir: <spec-dir>/.tp-review/<spec-base>) ve ilk {spec, review_rounds:[], audit_rounds:[]} indeksi ilk olusturanda yaziliyor (EnsureReviewState, internal/engine/reviewstate.go)
- Yazimlar state.json flock'u altinda (WithReviewStateLock, mevcut WithFileLock uzerinden); tur aritmetigi len+1, ConsecutiveClean kuyruk sayimi, SpecHash sha256:<hex> ve StateStale/Converged 8.6'ya gore (TestConsecutiveCleanAndStaleness)
- Bozuk state.json veya indekssiz-dolu dizin StateCorruptError ile abort (exit 3 + 'repair or delete <path>' hint'i cli'de baglanacak); eksik round dosyasi LoadRoundRows found=false ile atlanip uyarilabiliyor, tur aritmetiginde sayilmaya devam ediyor

tasks.title: Test review state engine
tasks.acceptance: - TestReviewState_RoundLifecycle TestReviewState_Staleness TestReviewState_CorruptIndexAborts pass per 19.1
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestReviewState_RoundLifecycle: kayit degistirilemez entry ekliyor (sonradan --resolve round dosyasini degistirse de clean/findings donmus kaliyor), clean-dirty-clean-clean -> consecutive_clean 2 (internal/cli/review_state_named_test.go)
- TestReviewState_Staleness: son kayitli turdan sonra spec duzenlenince stale=true + unconverge; eslesen hash converged tutuyor
- TestReviewState_CorruptIndexAborts: bozuk state.json VE indekssiz round dosyasi vakalari review/record/status/import genelinde exit 3 + 'repair or delete' hint'i; state.json byte'lari degismeden kaliyor (sessiz rebuild yok); engine-seviyesi primitifler reviewstate_test.go'da zaten testli

tasks.title: Implement workflow resolution chain
tasks.acceptance:
- discovery chain then spec-adjacent then defaults resolution with absolute path comparison per 8.6
- all six workflow fields resolved through the single chain
tasks.closed_reason:
- ResolveWorkflow (internal/engine/workflow_resolve.go): discovery chain -> spec-adjacent <base>.tasks.json -> DefaultWorkflow; spec alani task-dosyasi dizinine, CLI argumani CWD'ye gore mutlaklastirilip karsilastiriliyor (specMatches)
- Alti workflow alani tek zincirden donuyor (tf.Workflow butun halinde; defaults 2/2 clean, 0 cap, 600s, bos checks); 3 dal TestResolveWorkflow_* ile test edildi

tasks.title: Integrate state into review prompt generation
tasks.acceptance:
- auto round numbering, snapshot write, auto previous-findings into role prompts only per 8.3 items 1-3
- flag interaction matrix of 8.3 item 6 including --round conflict, --no-state behavior and review_loop shape, mode exclusivity
- state participation by perspective per 8.3 closing paragraph
tasks.closed_reason:
- 8.3 madde 1-3: R = kayitli tur + 1 otomatik numaralaniyor, snapshot-round-<R>.md byte kopyasi yaziliyor (kayittan once yeniden uretimde ayni dosya eziliyor), onceki bulgular round-1..R-1 dosyalarindan identity-key dedup'uyla UC rol prompt'una enjekte ediliyor, --findings kaynagi override ediyor (TestReviewStateRounds_Lifecycle)
- 8.3 madde 6 matrisi: state-türevli R ile celisen --round exit 2 + --no-state'e yonlendiren hint; --no-state tum okuma/yazmalari kapatiyor, round flag'i eko, convergence metnine kayit-yok notu; --no-state + --record/--status/--check exit 2 (TestReviewStateRounds_RoundConflictAndNoState); eski manuel akis testleri --no-state'e tasindi
- Perspektif katilimi: documentation/testing/code-audit state'e dokunmuyor (blok perspektif donuslerinden sonra; TestReviewStateRounds_PerspectivesDoNotTouchState)

tasks.title: Inject snapshot diff into prompts
tasks.acceptance:
- newest-earlier-snapshot diff block with 40-line and 6000-char caps per 8.3 item 4
- missing snapshot omits block with info; --diff-from overrides and forces at any round
tasks.closed_reason:
- R>=2'de en yeni round<R snapshot'i baseline alinip DiffSections ile 'Changed sections since round <k>' blogu HER prompt'a ekleniyor; bolum basina 40 satir, toplam 6000 karakter cap'leri buildChangedSectionsBlock'ta (internal/cli/review_autodiff.go; TestReviewAutoDiff_SnapshotBaseline, _SectionLineCap)
- Daha erken snapshot yoksa blok atlanip info satiri basiliyor; --diff-from baseline'i override edip blogu her turda (R=1 dahil) zorluyor — eski 'round >= 2' kisiti kaldirildi (TestReviewAutoDiff_DiffFromForcesAtRound1)

tasks.title: Emit review_loop schema v2
tasks.acceptance:
- every row of the 8.7 table implemented; max_rounds removed; convergence text is no findings surviving verification
- instruction names record and status --check loop
tasks.closed_reason:
- 8.7 tablosunun tum satirlari: round state-türevli (celisen flag exit 2 onceki gorevden), max_rounds struct'tan tamamen kaldirildi (tum modlar; TestReviewBasic yoklugunu dogruluyor), required_clean_rounds/consecutive_clean/converged/stale pointer alanlarla state'ten doluyor, --no-state'te omit ediliyor
- convergence metni 'no findings surviving verification (any severity) in <N> consecutive rounds'; instruction sub-agent -> merge -> --record -> '--status --check exit 0'a kadar tekrar dongusunu adlandiriyor (TestReviewRound1WithFindings guncel iddialari)

tasks.title: Implement tp review --record
tasks.acceptance:
- parse rules with blank-line skip and wontfix duplicate fixed row handling per 8.4 items 1-2 including empty-evidence rejection
- round file copy plus immutable index append with frozen clean flag; mechanize_candidates across all recorded rounds in output
tasks.closed_reason:
- 8.4 satir kurallari: bos satir atlama, gecersiz JSON'da satir numarasiyla exit 1, pre-resolved fixed abort, bos-kanitli wontfix exit 1, wontfix turu kirletmiyor, duplicate kirletiyor; sifir satir clean tur (parseRecordRows; TestReviewRecord_RowRules + _Lifecycle)
- Dosya review-round-<R>.ndjson olarak kopyalaniyor (once round dosyasi, sonra indeks; state flock altinda), clean bayragi kayit aninda donduruluyor; cikti mechanize_candidates'i kaydedilen TUM turlar uzerinden hesapliyor + register hint (TestReviewRecord_MechanizeCandidatesInOutput); bozuk state exit 3 + repair hint (TestReviewRecord_CorruptStateAborts)

tasks.title: Implement tp review --status --check
tasks.acceptance:
- status shape with budget_exhausted presence rule and full empty-state shape per 8.5
- --check runs checks and exits per converged and stale; bare --check exit 2
tasks.closed_reason:
- --status 8.5 seklini basiyor: review_rounds, consecutive_clean, required_clean_rounds (8.6 zinciriyle), converged, stale, mechanical_checks (kosum sonucu olmadan kayitli liste); bos state'te tam sekil + exit 0 (TestReviewStatus_EmptyStateFullShape); budget_exhausted yalniz cap>0 iken (8.8 formulu)
- --check tum workflow.checks'i 6.2 ortaminda kosuyor, pass/fail + yalniz basarisizlarda output_tail; exit 0 ancak converged VE tum checkler gecince (TestReviewStatus_CheckRunsChecksAndGatesExit); bare --check / --record --check / --status+mod kombinasyonlari exit 2 (TestReviewStatus_FlagRules); runMechanicalChecks 15.3 icin paylasilan yardimci

tasks.title: Implement tp audit --record --status
tasks.acceptance:
- non-PASS row counting, independent audit round sequence, spec_hash staleness per 10.1
- audit status shape without mechanical_checks plus empty-state shape and flag rejections per 10.2
- scope stays row counting aside from budget refusal per 10.3
tasks.closed_reason:
- 10.1: status alani PASS olmayan/eksik satirlar finding sayiliyor (countAuditFindings), dosya audit-round-<N>.ndjson olarak kopyalanip state.json.audit_rounds'a ekleniyor (review'den bagimsiz sira; TestAuditRecord_CountsNonPass), spec_hash/staleness 8.6 ile ayni
- 10.2: --status sekli mechanical_checks'siz, bos-state sekli exit 0, --check yalniz converged'de 0 (TestAuditStatus_Shapes); --record/--status karsilikli dislayici ve --affected-files/--findings reddi exit 2 (TestAuditRecordStatus_FlagRejections)
- 10.3: --record yalniz satir sayimi yapiyor, class okumuyor, mechanize_candidates yok (cikti anahtari yoklugu testte dogrulaniyor)

tasks.title: Test record and status machinery
tasks.acceptance: - TestReviewRecord_CleanAndDirty TestReviewStatus_Check TestAuditRecord_CountsNonPass TestAuditStatus_Check TestAuditRecordStatus_FlagRejections pass per 19.1 and 19.2
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestReviewRecord_CleanAndDirty: bos dosya clean, whitespace atlama, parse hatasi satir numarasiyla exit 1, hepsi-wontfix clean, pre-resolved fixed exit 1, bos-kanit wontfix exit 1, duplicate kirletiyor (internal/cli/record_status_named_test.go)
- TestReviewStatus_Check: converged+fresh+gecen checkler 0, uc kosuldan herhangi biri dusunce 1, sade --status checkleri kosmadan listeliyor (dosya-yazma kanitiyla); TestAuditStatus_Check: audit_clean_rounds ile converged 0, dirty/stale 1, sekilde mechanical_checks yok; TestAuditRecord_CountsNonPass ve TestAuditRecordStatus_FlagRejections onceki gorevden mevcut (internal/cli/audit_record_test.go)

tasks.title: Implement round budgets
tasks.acceptance:
- generation refusal with escalation hint for review and audit per 8.8; budget_exhausted formula and status-only placement
- --record beyond-cap refusal evaluated before parsing and writes for review and audit
- import enforcement never relaxed by the cap
tasks.closed_reason:
- Review default modu ve audit prompt uretimi cap dolu + unconverged iken exit 4 ve eskalasyon hint'iyle (uncounted pass -> kullanici onayli cap artisi / --force) refuse ediyor (refuseIfBudgetExhausted, budget.go; TestRoundBudget_ReviewRefusals/_AuditRefusals); cap-tetikli state okumasi corrupt abort'u devraliyor
- budget_exhausted = cap>0 AND rounds>=cap AND NOT converged; yalniz --status ciktilarinda ve cap>0 iken (onceki gorevlerde yerlesti, testlerde dogrulandi); converged dizi cap'te bile refuse edilmiyor (TestRoundBudget_ConvergedAtCapNotRefused)
- --record refusal satir parse ve her turlu state yazimindan ONCE (round dosyasi olusmadigi testte dogrulaniyor); import enforcement cap'ten etkilenmiyor (enforcement 9.1 gorevi cap'i hic okumuyor)

tasks.title: Test round budget escalation
tasks.acceptance: - TestRoundBudget_Escalates passes per 19.2 with review and audit fixtures
tasks.closed_reason: - TestRoundBudget_Escalates 19.2 tarifinin tamamini kapsiyor: iki cap da 2, ikiser dirty tur; review prompt uretimi exit 4 + eskalasyon hint, cap otesi review/audit --record exit 4, iki --status sekli de budget_exhausted:true, audit uretimi ayni sekilde blokli, import enforcement cap'ten bagimsiz exit 1 (internal/cli/budget_escalates_test.go); suite + lint yesil

tasks.title: Enforce convergence at import
tasks.acceptance:
- state lookup with pinned path bases, consecutive_clean and staleness checks, divergence warning per 9.1
- failure hints including the exhausted-budget escalation sequence; --force bypass; zero-task shell imports without --force
- no-state info line per 9.2
tasks.closed_reason:
- State dizini pinned yolla bulunuyor (hedef task dosyasi dizini + spec basename); kayitli tur varsa consecutive_clean>=required ve staleness kontrolu, gecemeyen import exit 1 (TestImportEnforcement_Convergence unconverged/stale alt testleri); governing deger 8.6-cozumlu degerden sapinca iki degeri adlandiran uyari
- Hata hint'i tp review --record + --force'u adlandiriyor; butce doluyken hint 8.8 eskalasyon dizisine donusuyor (exhausted_budget alt testi); --force iki kontrolu de atliyor; sifir-gorevli init shell --force'suz ezilebiliyor, gercek gorevli dosya --force istiyor (TestImport_ShellOverwriteNoForce)
- State yokken/tur yokken import 'review convergence not verified (no recorded rounds)' info'suyla geciyor (no_state alt testi); cap enforcement'i asla gevsetmiyor

tasks.title: Preserve workflow on import
tasks.acceptance: - raw workflow-key detection carries existing workflow for wrapped and bare-array imports per 9.3
tasks.closed_reason:
- Ham JSON'da top-level workflow anahtari yoklamasi (importedHasWorkflowKey, internal/cli/import_workflow.go) struct varsayilanlarindan ONCE calisiyor; hedef dosya varsa mevcut workflow blogu tasiniyor — wrapped ve bare-array her iki yol icin (TestImport_WorkflowPreservation 4 alt test)
- Bare-array sarmalama artik DefaultWorkflow + status='open' varsayilani aliyor (v0.22.0 canli buginin koku: sifir workflow + bos status validasyondan dusuyordu); workflow anahtari tasiyan import ise kendi workflow'unu yaziyor

tasks.title: Test import enforcement
tasks.acceptance: - TestImport_ConvergenceEnforced TestImport_WorkflowPreserved TestImport_ShellOverwriteNoForce pass per 19.2
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestImport_ConvergenceEnforced: unconverged exit 1, stale exit 1, --force baypasi, state yoksa yalniz info (import_enforce_test.go — isim 19.2'ye hizalandi)
- TestImport_WorkflowPreserved: workflow anahtarsiz --force re-import quality_gate VE checks'i koruyor (checks iddiasi eklendi); TestImport_ShellOverwriteNoForce: sifir-gorevli shell --force'suz ezilebiliyor, enforcement armed kaliyor, gorevli dosya --force istiyor

- 11.3 govde sirasi: persona, changed-sections blogu (8.3-4 ile ayni insa), 50-kapakli newest-first fixed bulgular ('finding — evidence' satirlari), uc numarali kontrol, standart finding formati; 15.3 geregi mekanik checkler regression modunda da kosup exclusion blogu ekliyor

tasks.closed_reason:
- 12.3 tablosunun tum satirlari: non-software domain'de uc persona degisiyor (execute-exactly / verify-every-claim / internal-consistency), implementer'in happy-path sorusu ve architect'in backward-compat + performance sorulari dusuyor; yapisal ve tester'in vague/divergent sorulari domain-notr kaliyor (promptDomain, TestDomainLens_NonSoftwarePersonasAndDrops + _SoftwareDomainUnchanged)
- Lens: lens.all rol ve regression prompt'larinin numarali listesine, lens.<role> yalniz kendi roluna, sira hardcoded -> all -> role-specific (appendLensQuestions; regression yalniz all aliyor — TestDomainLens_RegressionGetsAllLens; siralama index karsilastirmasiyla dogrulandi)

- checks='<json-array>' tam liste degistirme semantigiyle yaziliyor (set.go checks dali; TestSetWorkflowChecks_ReplaceAndValidate replace alt testi)
- engine.ValidateChecks: anchored ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$ slug, dizide teklik, bos olmayan cmd; ihlalde exit 1 ve suclu index adlandiriliyor (checks[N] formati, testte 3 vaka)

tasks.title: Execute mechanical checks at review
tasks.acceptance:
- checks run in default and regression modes, workflow-derived even under --no-state, with resolved timeout and cwd per 15.3
- mechanical_checks output with failure tails; invalid entries skipped with info and validate warning
- prompt exclusion block and instruction per 15.5; --status --check integration per 15.4
tasks.closed_reason:
- Checkler default review modunda prompt uretiminden once sirayla kosuyor (8.6 cozumlu workflow, cozumlu gate_timeout, cwd = task dosyasi dizini; runMechanicalChecks paylasilan yardimci); workflow-türevli olduklari icin --no-state altinda da kosup exclusion emit ediyorlar (TestChecksExecution_RunsUnderNoState); regression perspektifi geldiginde ayni yardimciyi kullanacak
- mechanical_checks cikti alani {class, cmd, passed, exit_code} + yalniz basarisizlarda output_tail (son 20 satir); hatalar uretimi durdurmuyor (TestChecksExecution_PromptExclusion); gecersiz entry exec sirasinda info ile atlaniyor, tp validate warning veriyor (validateConvergence'a ValidateChecks eklendi)
- 15.5 exclusion blogu her prompt'ta class listesiyle, instruction 'fix those failures before spawning sub-agents' ekliyor; 15.4 --status --check entegrasyonu onceki gorevde (TestReviewStatus_Check)

tasks.title: Test checks validation and execution

tasks.closed_reason:
- TestWorkflowChecks_Validation: gecersiz slug, duplicate class, bos cmd her biri index adiyla reddediliyor (internal/engine/checks_named_test.go)
- TestValidate_GateTimeoutRange: 9999 degeri validate warning uretiyor, EffectiveGateTimeoutSeconds 600'e dusuyor; TestChecksExecution_PromptExclusion onceki gorevden mevcut (internal/cli/checks_execution_test.go)
